processes.name: Develop Marketing Roadmap Document
processes.description: Get a comprehensive marketing strategy crafted to meet your unique business objectives. This task captures your company's story, ideal customers, positioning, content plan and strategic marketing goals. Ultimately, the strategy provides a foundation for the engagement and ensures all stakeholders are on the same page.

processes.name: Develop Marketing Research Document
processes.description: Consolidate qualitative and quantitative research, identify strategic marketing opportunities and present key findings.

processes.name: Client Onboarding & Kickoff
processes.description: Begin your journey with Marketers in Demand as we set the stage for a successful partnership. This initial set of internal tasks builds an understanding of your unique business needs to further explore in the kickoff.

processes.name: Develop Marketing Research Document
processes.description: Consolidate qualitative and quantitative research, identify strategic marketing opportunities and present key findings.

processes.name: Update Marketing Roadmap Document
processes.description: Update the comprehensive marketing strategy using information from weekly meetings. Establish new goals and identify point allocations for the quarter.

processes.name: Develop Marketing Roadmap Document
processes.description: Get a comprehensive marketing strategy crafted to meet your unique business objectives. This task captures your company's story, ideal customers, positioning, content plan and strategic marketing goals. Ultimately, the strategy provides a foundation for the engagement and ensures all stakeholders are on the same page.

processes.name: Develop Content Plan Document
processes.description: Strategize your content initiatives with a plan that outlines topics, formats, and distribution channels. This document ensures that your content resonates with your target audience, establishes authority, and drives engagement.

processes.name: Develop SEO Plan Document
processes.description: Elevate your online presence with a strategic SEO plan that outlines keyword research, on-page optimization, and link-building tactics. During this process, we conduct an audit of your existing traffic, identify priorities for optimization and pinpoint new opportunities for content creation. This document ensures your website ranks higher on search engines, attracts quality traffic, and boosts your brand's visibility.

processes.name: Develop Event Plan Document
processes.description: Orchestrate seamless events with a comprehensive plan that covers all aspects from logistics to marketing. This document ensures every detail is meticulously organized, enabling a memorable experience for your attendees and achieving your event goals with precision.

processes.name: Develop Video Plan Document
processes.description: Connect with your ideal customers using video content. This plan identifies the specific requirements for a video project, including creative elements, scripts/storyboards, and production logistics.

processes.name: Develop Social Plan Document
processes.description: Amplify your brand's social presence with a plan that outlines content strategies, engagement tactics, and platform-specific guidelines. This document ensures that your social media initiatives are cohesive, engaging, and aligned with your brand's objectives.

processes.name: Develop Website Plan Document
processes.description: Establish a roadmap for your online presence with a detailed plan that covers website design, user experience, and functionality. This document ensures that your website aligns with your brand's goals and offers an optimal experience for visitors.

processes.name: Develop Paid Media Plan Document
processes.description: Optimize your advertising efforts with a plan that details budget allocation, platform selection, and targeting criteria. This document serves as a guide to ensure your paid media campaigns achieve maximum ROI and effectively reach your target audience. Up to 3 channels and $10k in ad spend. Additional channels and/or spend will have a custom points value.

processes.name: Develop Performance Reporting Plan Document
processes.description: Identify the key data points that we will track for the various campaigns we are running, where this data comes from, and how we can get access to that data to report on. This document ensures that we have a plan for tracking campaign performance across relevant channels.

processes.name: Develop Branding Plan Document
processes.description: Craft a comprehensive blueprint that outlines your brand's story, differentiators, and primary positioning. In addition, document the visual identity used in owned and amplified experiences. This document serves as the cornerstone for all branding initiatives, ensuring consistency and resonance across all touchpoints.

processes.name: Develop ABM Plan Document
processes.description: Design a targeted approach to B2B marketing with a plan that identifies key accounts and outlines personalized engagement strategies. This document ensures that your ABM initiatives are cohesive, targeted, and effective. Depending on complexity (1:1, 1:few), this could have a custom points value.

processes.name: Develop Guest Booking Plan Document
processes.description: Develop a targeted guest booking outreach plan that is a strategic framework designed to secure high-quality guests for a podcast. It involves identifying potential guests, crafting personalized outreach communications, and managing the scheduling process.

processes.name: Develop Messaging Plan Document
processes.description: Create a plan to position your company uniquely in the market, and identify the core messages and language that will make a mark in the minds of your ideal customer profile. Get your positioning and messaging right, and it has a multiplying effect on all other marketing efforts.

processes.name: Tech stack
processes.description: Fixed fees associated with tech stack used for client engagement. This is a variable points value depending on tech required for the engagement.

processes.name: Create & send newsletter
processes.description: Curate and design a newsletter edition that offers the latest updates, insights, and valuable content, fostering a sense of community and brand loyalty among subscribers.

processes.name: Set up YouTube video campaign
processes.description: Configure and launch a YouTube advertising campaign by setting up targeting, placements, and campaign structure to effectively promote video content and drive views, engagement, or conversions.

processes.name: Set up social
processes.description: Initiate your social media efforts, posting curated content and fostering community engagement to build a loyal and engaged following.

processes.name: Manage social
processes.description: Maintain a consistent posting schedule according to the Social Media Plan. Management includes one channel; for any additional channels, we add 3 points to the management cost.

processes.name: Set up paid media
processes.description: Prepare the groundwork for your advertising campaigns by selecting the right platforms, creating accounts, establishing campaign parameters, defining target audiences, and ensuring a strong foundation for successful campaigns.

processes.name: Manage performance reporting
processes.description: Manage key marketing metrics. Maintain a dashboard to facilitate weekly meetings.

processes.name: Develop outreach sequence
processes.description: Craft a series of strategically timed emails designed to nurture leads, foster relationships, and encourage conversions, ensuring consistent touchpoints with your audience.

processes.name: Develop SEO-optimized web page
processes.description: Design and develop an SEO-optimized web page that integrates seamlessly with your main website, ensuring brand consistency while optimizing for organic traffic and conversions.

processes.name: Develop feature spotlight video
processes.description: Showcase a unique product feature in a captivating 30-second video, designed to attract attention and drive action through strong visual appeal and clear calls-to-action. Asset includes dynamic text, motion graphics, voiceover, and background music.

processes.name: Develop feature tutorial video
processes.description: Craft a brief (20-30 seconds), clear tutorial video visually explaining a specific product feature, ideal for audiences familiar with your platform needing further activation and education.

processes.name: Develop a product walkthrough video
processes.description: Produce an engaging ~2-minute guided video walkthrough using a combination of voiceover, screen captures, and dynamic text. The video will clearly demonstrate your product's functionality, ideal for retargeting and deeper engagement.

processes.name: Create SEO blog inspired by transcript
processes.description: Write an insightful, 1,500–1,800 word blog post based on the provided transcript. The piece should be strategically crafted and fully optimized to achieve a specific SEO objective, as defined in the SEO Plan.

processes.name: Develop SEO blog post
processes.description: Write a well-researched and insightful blog post between 1,500 - 1,800 words, specifically built and optimized around a specific SEO goal, as outlined in the SEO Plan.

processes.name: Optimize Existing SEO Article
processes.description: Optimize an existing blog article by improving on-page SEO elements, refining keyword targeting, and enhancing content structure to increase search visibility, organic traffic, and overall performance.

processes.name: Develop ebook w/ design
processes.description: Create a comprehensive 3,000 word ebook that delves deep into a subject, offering readers valuable content in a format that establishes your brand's expertise and authority.

processes.name: SEO-Optimize Landing Page
processes.description: Optimize an existing landing page for search engines by refining on-page SEO elements, improving content structure, and aligning messaging to increase organic visibility and conversion performance.

processes.name: Video Clip Package w/ Custom Graphics
processes.description: Produce a set of engaging video ads that effectively convey your brand's message, ensuring a memorable and impactful advertising experience for viewers.

processes.name: Develop Brand Guidelines Document
processes.description: Create a comprehensive brand guidelines document that defines visual identity, tone of voice, and usage standards, ensuring consistency across all marketing, content, and communication channels.

processes.name: Distribute episode
processes.description: Upload final assets (audio, video, and written) to the appropriate platforms. These platforms include Youtube, podcasting hosting platform, etc. In addition, show notes or blog posts can also be added to your website for final distribution.

processes.name: Develop Google Ads text ad creative package
processes.description: Create a compelling Google Ads creative package that captures attention and drives action, ensuring your advertising messages and keywords resonate with your target audience.

processes.name: Develop an infographic
processes.description: Simplify complex data or concepts in a visual format such as an illustration or single-page PDF. Process includes mapping out the content, creating a wireframe and designing the final product.

processes.name: Develop a text ad variation package
processes.description: Design a compelling text ad creative package that captures attention and drives action, ensuring your advertising messages resonate with your target audience. Text ads do include corresponding still images.

processes.name: Develop animated video
processes.description: Deliver a concise 1-2 minute video dynamically outlining core product features, clearly demonstrating value, and empowering customers through visually engaging animations and graphics. Asset includes script development, design, 2D animation, voiceover and background music. Typical duration is 60-90 seconds. Total points can vary based on complexity of animation (2D vs. 3D), video duration, etc.

processes.name: Develop episode for a series
processes.description: Craft an engaging podcast or video series episode that delves into relevant topics, offering listeners valuable insights and expert opinions, fostering a community of loyal followers. Episode content suite typically includes promo/clip videos, full-length video, audio, and short form written content.

processes.name: Rebuild show design & graphics package
processes.description: Refresh and redesign your show’s visual identity by updating branding elements and graphic assets to ensure a cohesive, professional, and engaging look across all episode content and promotional materials.

processes.name: Develop case study w/ design
processes.description: Create a comprehensive up to 1,500 word case study that delves deep into a specific use case of the product or service, highlighting the benefits of working with you.

processes.name: Develop dynamic outreach sequence
processes.description: Craft a series of strategically timed emails designed to nurture leads, foster relationships, and encourage conversions, ensuring consistent touchpoints with your audience, using AI to personalize email strings to each contact.

processes.name: Develop thought leadership blog post
processes.description: Write a well-researched and insightful 1,500 - 1,800 word blog post based on existing sources that address industry trends or audience pain points, establishing your brand as a thought leader in the field.

processes.name: Develop simple newsletter template
processes.description: Design and develop a customizable newsletter template that aligns with your brand's visual identity, ensuring a consistent and professional look for all your newsletter editions.

processes.name: Manage content
processes.description: Manage and execute a content program by generating ideas, creating blogs, videos, and podcasts, or other pieces of content. Continuously review performance to refine and improve results.

processes.name: Develop slide deck or presentation
processes.description: Create a comprehensive slide deck to support your sales team. Includes outline, copy and custom design elements.

processes.name: Develop custom html newsletter template
processes.description: Design and develop a customizable newsletter template that aligns with your brand's visual identity, ensuring a consistent and professional look for all your newsletter editions.

processes.name: Develop video ad creative package
processes.description: Produce a set of engaging video ads that effectively convey your brand's message, ensuring a memorable and impactful advertising experience for viewers.

processes.name: Develop image ad creative package
processes.description: Create a package of visually compelling image ads designed to capture attention and drive engagement, ensuring your brand stands out in advertising spaces.

processes.name: Develop web page
processes.description: Design and develop a web page that integrates seamlessly with your main website, ensuring brand consistency while optimizing for conversions.

processes.name: Develop social content (monthly)
processes.description: Curate a monthly package of social media content, ensuring a consistent and engaging brand presence across various platforms. Pricing starts at 8 points for up to 12 posts, but increases with additional content.

processes.name: Develop interview series video
processes.description: Produce a video based upon interviews with industry experts or key figures, offering viewers valuable insights and fostering brand credibility.

processes.name: Develop webinar
processes.description: Post-produce a webinar that offers deep insights on a specific topic, providing attendees with valuable knowledge and fostering brand engagement. Assets include audio, video and written content.

processes.name: Manage ABM
processes.description: Multi-channel engagement tracking across email, LinkedIn, and website touchpoints with AI-powered lead qualification, real-time sales notifications, account-level analytics, and weekly performance reporting.

processes.name: Develop blog from a transcript
processes.description: Based on a video series, podcast, webinar, or another video asset, write a well-researched and insightful 1,500 - 1,800 word content piece that captures the value delivered in the video asset.

processes.name: Develop Press Release
processes.description: Create a professionally written press release that clearly communicates key announcements, ensuring your message is newsworthy, well-structured, and ready for distribution across relevant media channels.

processes.name: Manage paid media
processes.description: Oversee and optimize your advertising campaigns, making real-time adjustments based on performance data to ensure maximum reach, engagement, and ROI. Starts with 2 channels and minimum of $2k in ad spend. Additional channels and/or spend will have a custom points value.

processes.name: Set up content & create graphics package
processes.description: Launch a specific content program, by publishing and promoting content that resonates with your target audience.

processes.name: Manage web (advanced)
processes.description: Oversee the ongoing performance and functionality of your website, making regular updates and optimizations to ensure a seamless user experience and alignment with your marketing goals. Includes light development adjustments or code changes based on your requirements.

processes.name: Configure additional paid media campaign
processes.description: The setup, configuration, and launching of a paid media campaign with previously created assets and defined targeting.

processes.name: Manage SEO
processes.description: Continuously monitor and refine your SEO strategies, making adjustments based on performance data to ensure sustained organic visibility and traffic growth.

processes.name: Set up SEO
processes.description: Kickstart your SEO initiatives by implementing on-page and off-page strategies, ensuring your website is primed to achieve higher search engine rankings.

processes.name: Set up Podcast Download Campaign
processes.description: Develop a paid campaign to encourage podcast downloads for the show.

processes.name: Manage ABM
processes.description: Implement your targeted marketing efforts, reaching out to identified accounts with tailored content and strategies designed to resonate and foster relationships. Depending on complexity (1:1, 1:few), this could have a custom points value.

processes.name: Manage paid media
processes.description: Oversee and optimize your advertising campaigns, making real-time adjustments based on performance data to ensure maximum reach, engagement, and ROI. Starts with 2 channels and minimum of $2k in ad spend. Additional channels and/or spend will have a custom points value.

processes.name: Manage guest booking services
processes.description: Oversee the ongoing operations of the guest booking service. This includes maintaining relationships with potential guests, managing the scheduling process, ensuring a steady flow of interesting and relevant guests for your podcast, and handling any logistical aspects related to guest appearances.

processes.name: Set up guest booking outreach
processes.description: Establish a system for acquiring high-quality guests for your podcast. This involves creating a process for identifying, reaching out to, and scheduling interviews with guests who bring valuable insights and engaging content to your podcast episodes.

processes.name: Launch website
processes.description: Bring your digital vision to life by launching your website, ensuring it offers an optimal experience for visitors and effectively communicates your brand message. Update DNS information, manage cutover to live site and finalize staging environment.

processes.name: Set up performance reporting
processes.description: Establish a baseline configuration for tracking key marketing metrics. Develop a dashboard to facilitate weekly meetings.

processes.name: Set Up ABM
processes.description: Lay the foundation for targeted ABM campaigns by identifying key accounts, setting up the infrastructure and crafting personalized engagement strategies. Continuously monitor and refine your ABM initiatives, ensuring they remain effective, relevant, and aligned with the evolving needs of your target accounts.

processes.name: Develop episode for a series [Live Recording]
processes.description: Based on a live episode recording, craft an engaging podcast or video series episode that delves into relevant topics, offering listeners valuable insights and expert opinions, fostering a community of loyal followers. Episode content suite typically includes promo/clip videos, full-length video, audio, and short form written content.

processes.name: Set up ABM
processes.description: Lay the foundation for targeted ABM campaigns by identifying key accounts, setting up the infrastructure and crafting personalized engagement strategies. Continuously monitor and refine your ABM initiatives, ensuring they remain effective, relevant, and aligned with the evolving needs of your target accounts.

processes.name: Manage web
processes.description: Oversee the ongoing performance and functionality of your website, making regular updates and optimizations to ensure a seamless user experience and alignment with your marketing goals.

processes.name: Set up website
processes.description: Create staging environment, set up hosting, connect integrations, migrate content from previous host/environment.

processes.name: Facilitate Client Meetings
processes.description: Align on progress and pave the way for future successes. This collaborative session involves reviewing the status of current tasks and strategizing for the month ahead, fostering a cohesive and proactive approach to achieving your business objectives and maintaining a steady trajectory of growth.
